title: Code with Claude 2026 | Tokyo
summary: Anthropic presented "Code with Claude 2026" in Tokyo, showcasing updates to Claude models, the Claude Platform, and Claude Code. Industry partners Canva, Mizuho, and NRI demonstrated their implementations built on Claude.
writeup: This video captures Anthropic's "Code with Claude 2026" event in Tokyo, covering updates across three areas: the Claude models, the Claude Platform, and Claude Code. It also features demonstrations from industry partners Canva, Mizuho, and NRI, each showing implementations built on Claude. The result is a combined view of Anthropic's product direction alongside concrete deployments from companies in design and financial services.
